pandocultimateconverter-desc: File-to-article conversion option during upload process
pandocultimateconverter-summary: File-to-article conversion option during upload process
pandocultimateconverter-warning-page-nam: The article title is either too short or too long. Length is restricted to between $1 and $2 characters.
The article title contains invalid characters of the following: $1.
pandocultimateconverter-conversion-compl: Conversion complete, file is automatically deleted
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-d: Please specify file and target page name. If page already exists, its content will be overwritten.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-f: Choose what do you want to convert to a wiki page
pandocultimateconverter-special-page-pla: Type in the title for the article created here. Existing article will be overwritten.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-t: Target page name (will be overwritten if exists)
pandocultimateconverter-error-filetype-b: The file type $1 is not allowed on this wiki. You can fix it via adding this line to LocalSettings.php: '$2wgFileExtensions[] = "$1";'
pandocultimateconverter-error-uploaddisa: Upload is disabled on wiki. Enable it by adding '$wgEnableUploads = true;' to LocalSettings.php
pandocultimateconverter-error-mustbelogg: Only logged in users can upload files on this wiki. Please login to proceed.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-invalid: Only http and https URLs are supported.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-pageexi: The target page already exists. Pass forceoverwrite=1 to overwrite it.
apihelp-pandocconvert-summary: Convert an uploaded file or URL to a wiki page using Pandoc.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-pagename: Target wiki page title. Existing content will be overwritten when forceoverwrite is set.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-filename: Name of an already-uploaded file in the wiki repository (e.g. "Document.docx"). Mutually exclusive with 'url'.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-url: Remote http/https URL to fetch and convert. Mutually exclusive with 'filename'.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-forceoverwri: If set, overwrite the target page if it already exists.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-file: Convert an already-uploaded file named Document.docx to the page MyArticle.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-url: Convert the content at https://example.com to the page MyArticle.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-descriptio: Add files or URLs to convert into wiki pages. You can process multiple items at once.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-dropzone-t: Drop files here or click to browse
pandocultimateconverter-codex-dropzone-h: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, ODT, HTML, EPUB, and others supported by Pandoc
pandocultimateconverter-codex-queue-over: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|page already exists|pages already exist}} and will be overwritten
pandocultimateconverter-codex-page-exist: This page already exists and will be overwritten
pandocultimateconverter-codex-navigate-w: Conversion is in progress. Are you sure you want to leave?
pandocultimateconverter-codex-invalid-ur: Invalid URL (only http and https are supported)
pandocexport-summary: Export wiki pages to external document formats (DOCX, ODT, EPUB, and more) using Pandoc.
pandocultimateconverter-export-descripti: Add pages or categories to export, choose a format, then click Export. Categories will include all their pages and subcategories.
pandocultimateconverter-export-page-plac: Search for a page or category…
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-no-: Please add at least one page or category to export.
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-inv: The requested export format is not supported.
pandocultimateconverter-export-separate-: Download separate file for each page (ZIP archive)
